# Yui (Wayne) Tien

> Taipei-based AI product builder and Digital Persona Technical Director at MorphusAI. Works across 0-to-1 AI product design/launch and the technical orchestration of AI agent behavior — AI persona/character systems, agent memory and context preservation, runtime diagnostics, and demo-to-delivery (POC → MVP → launch) systems.

Yui Tien (also known as Wayne Tien) is a product builder based in Taipei, Taiwan. He bridges product design and deep technical orchestration of AI agents: building AI personas and virtual character systems, keeping agent memory and context coherent across tools, diagnosing runtime failures (provider mismatches, auth/plugin failures, session drift, tool-call issues), and standardizing the workflows that turn raw ideas into demo-ready products. He currently leads a small technical team at MorphusAI.

- Name: Yui Tien (English name: Wayne Tien)
- Role: Digital Persona Technical Director & Virtual Character Systems Engineer, MorphusAI (since 2024)
- Location: Taipei, Taiwan
- Focus: AI agent workflow operations, AI persona/character systems, runtime diagnostics, demo-to-delivery systems, UI/UX engineering
- Site: https://waynetien.com (available in English, 繁體中文, 日本語, 한국어)

## Selected work

- [Personal Agent Operating System](https://waynetien.com/en/project/openclaw-ops): Discord-native task routing, persistent cross-tool memory, self-correcting workflows, and operating contracts for multi-agent runtimes.
- [AI Character Live Runtime](https://waynetien.com/en/project/persona-workflows): made the SHIKI AI character system demo-ready — persona readiness checks, stream-link flows, OBS/runtime debugging, and operator handoff docs.
- [Local Voice Infrastructure Migration](https://waynetien.com/en/project/voice-migration): moved a cloud voice stack to local inference — legacy-compatible adapter, speaker mapping, benchmark plan, and canary rollout.
- [AI Product Demo Flow](https://waynetien.com/en/project/morphus-website): MorphusAI product presentation — information architecture, demo narrative, launch-facing copy, and visual polish.
- [Personal Portfolio Site](https://waynetien.com/en/project/portfolio-site): this site — an expressive, interactive portfolio built from zero with AI agents as a meta case study.

## Quick answers

- Who is Yui (Wayne) Tien? A Taipei-based AI product builder and Digital Persona Technical Director at MorphusAI.
- What does he do? Designs and ships AI products end-to-end, and orchestrates AI agent behavior — personas, agent memory/context, runtime diagnostics, and demo-to-delivery systems.
- Where is he based? Taipei, Taiwan.
- How to contact? Email youwei0112@gmail.com, LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/in/yui-tien/, GitHub https://github.com/YUI-TIEN
